properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I cast my mind to Calvary Where Jesus bled and died for me. I see His wounds, His hands, His feet. My Savior on that cursed tree

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His body bound and drenched in tears They laid Him down in Joseph's tomb. The entrance sealed by heavy stone Messiah still and all alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O praise the name of the Lord our God O praise His name forever more For endless days we will sing Your praise Oh Lord, oh Lord our God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Then on the third at break of dawn, The Son of heaven rose again. O trampled death where is your sting? The angels roar for Christ the King

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He shall return in robes of white, The blazing Son shall pierce the night. And I will rise among the saints, My gaze transfixed on Jesus' face
